# Demultiplexers (DMUXs)

$\boxed{Y_{n}=S·I·m_{n}}$
$n=0,1,\dots 2^{n}-1$
$m_{n}=m_{n}(Q_{M-1},\dots,Q_{0})$
$1-to-2^{M}$ DMUX
<svg version="1.1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 500 740" width="500" height="740"><!-- svg-source:excalidraw --><metadata></metadata><defs><symbol id="image-20cd078a642023202437d000ed778bbbb1afb0f9"><image href="data:image/svg+xml;base64," preserveAspectRatio="none" width="100%" height="100%"></image></symbol><style class="style-fonts">

---
Type 0 Design

$$
F\overbrace{ (x_{m-1},\dots,x_{0}) }^{M}= \sum ^{\text{cann SOP}}_{n:f_{n}=1}m_{n}
$$
$m_{n}=m_{n}(x_{m-1},\dots ,x_{0})$
$n=0,1,\dots,2^{M}-1$
DMUX type 0
![[DMUX_type0.jpg]]
---
## DMUX-MUX structure in a single design
![[IMG_20251202_100204.jpg]]
